description_long: This is a red Coca-Cola branded food truck with a robust, utilitarian design and a six-wheeled chassis. The truck features a large, flatbed cargo area loaded with red beverage crates, each crate detailed with open slots and stacked in an orderly fashion. The cab is boxy with a metallic hood scoop, side mirrors, and tinted windows, giving it a rugged, industrial look. The sides of the truck display the Coca-Cola logo and a metallic trim, while the rear is dominated by the stacked crates. The wheels are large and black, suitable for heavy loads and urban delivery. The overall appearance is functional and commercial, designed for beverage transport and distribution.
description: A red Coca-Cola food truck with a six-wheel chassis and a flatbed loaded with red beverage crates, featuring a rugged, industrial design and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the truck's grille, hood scoop, windshield, and the stacked crates extending from the cab rearward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Coca-Cola logo, side mirrors, tinted windows, and the full length of the crate-laden flatbed.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the stacked red beverage crates and the flatbed's metallic trim.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crates, wheels, and cab details, but with a clearer view of the rear wheel arrangement.
attribute_signage: Coca-Cola logo and text on the cab doors
